zh.Grangärde, Ludvika, Kopparberg, Sweden: 瑞典可帕波格盧德維卡格朗亞德
zh.Skaraborg, Dalarnas, Sweden: 瑞典達拉納斯卡拉波格
zh.lifeSummary: 當Brita Persdotter於1590年出生在瑞典可帕波格盧德維卡格朗亞德時，她的父親Per Olofsson Uvbergs45歲，母親Kerstin Karin Larsdotter30歲。她和Cornelius Nils Jestenburgh至少有1個女兒。她去世於1663年享年73歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Brita Persdotter于1590年出生在瑞典可帕波格盧德維卡格朗亞德时，她的父亲Per Olofsson Uvbergs45岁，母亲Kerstin Karin Larsdotter30岁。她和Cornelius Nils Jestenburgh至少有1个女儿。她去世于1663年享年73岁。

nameMeanings.name: Brita
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Borrowing of the Irish name Brighid ( see Bridget ). This name owes its enormous popularity in Scandinavia, especially in Sweden, to St Birgitta ( 1304–73 ), patron saint of Sweden. She was a noblewoman who bore her husband eight children. After his death, she founded an order of nuns, the ‘Bridgettines’ or Order of the Most Holy Saviour. She also went to Rome, where she attempted to reform religious life.

variants.name: Birgitte

variants.name: Britt
meanings: contracted form of Birgit ( see Bridget ), made famous in the English-speaking world by the Swedish actress Britt Ekland ( b. 1942 ; her surname was originally Eklund ).

historicEvents.description: Treaty of Stolbovo ended Swedish occupation of Northern Russia.
1618-1648 Sweden fights in the Thirty Years' War.

historicEvents.title: The Thirty Years' War
historicEvents.description: King Gustavus Adolphus entered Sweden into the Thirty Years' War in 1630 with great success on the side of the German Protestants.
Queen Christina abdicated throne. Converted to Catholicism, later buried in Rome in St. Peter's.

en.lifeSummary: When Brita Persdotter was born in 1590, in Grangärde, Ludvika, Kopparberg, Sweden, her father, Per Olofsson Uvbergs, was 45 and her mother, Kerstin Karin Larsdotter, was 30. She had at least 1 daughter with Cornelius Nils Jestenburgh. She died in 1663, at the age of 73.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Brita Persdotter est née en 1590, à Grangärde, Ludvika, Kopparberg, Suède, son père, Per Olofsson Uvbergs, avait 45 ans et sa mère, Kerstin Karin Larsdotter, avait 30 ans. Elle a eu au moins 1 fille avec Cornelius Nils Jestenburgh. Elle est décédée en 1663, à l’âge de 73 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Brita Persdotter 1590 in Grangärde, Ludvika, Kopparberg, Schweden geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Per Olofsson Uvbergs 45 und ihre Mutter Kerstin Karin Larsdotter 30. Sie hatte mit Cornelius Nils Jestenburgh mindestens 1 Tochter. Sie starb 1663 im Alter von 73 Jahren.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Brita Persdotter è nata il nel 1590 nel Grangärde, Ludvika, Kopparberg, Svezia, sua padre, Per Olofsson Uvbergs, aveva 45 anni e sua madre, Kerstin Karin Larsdotter, aveva 30 anni. Lei avuto almeno 1 figlia con Cornelius Nils Jestenburgh. Morì nel 1663, all'età di 73 anni.

ja.Grangärde, Dalarna, Sweden: スウェーデンダラーナグラングaルド
ja.lifeSummary: Brita Persdotterが1590年にスウェーデンコッパルバーグルドヴィカグラングaルドで生まれた時，父Per Olofsson Uvbergsは45歳，母Kerstin Karin Larsdotterは30歳であった。彼女はCornelius Nils Jestenburghとの間に少なくとも1人の娘をもうけた。彼女は1663年に73歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Brita Persdotter(이)가 1590년 스웨덴 코파르버그 루드빅아 그랑a르드에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Per Olofsson Uvbergs(은)는 45세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Kerstin Karin Larsdotter(은)는 30세였다. 그녀는 Cornelius Nils Jestenburgh(와)과 적어도 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1663년 73세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Brita Persdotter nasceu em 1590, em Grangärde, Ludvika, Kopparberg, Suécia, seu pai, Per Olofsson Uvbergs, tinha 45 anos e sua mãe, Kerstin Karin Larsdotter, tinha 30 anos. Ela teve pelo menos 1 filha com Cornelius Nils Jestenburgh. Ela faleceu em 1663, com 73 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Brita Persdotter родилась в 1590 г. в местности грангaрд, лудвика, коппарбирг, Швеция, её отцу по имени Per Olofsson Uvbergs было 45 лет, а матери, которую звали Kerstin Karin Larsdotter, 30. У неё была по крайней мере 1 дочь от Cornelius Nils Jestenburgh. Она умерла в 1663 г. в возрасте 73 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Brita Persdotter nació en 1590, en Grangärde, Ludvika, Kopparberg, Suecia, su papá, Per Olofsson Uvbergs, tenía 45 años y su mamá, Kerstin Karin Larsdotter, tenía 30 años. Tuvo por lo menos 1 hija con Cornelius Nils Jestenburgh. Murió en 1663, a la edad de 73 años.
